session_summary: Two-session block covering WSL2 Jest hang diagnosis and fix, full test suite restoration, and a comprehensive security hardening pass across the EBA codebase.

key_decisions.decision: Add isolatedModules:true to tsconfig.json to prevent ts-jest from hanging on WSL2 NTFS mounts
key_decisions.rationale: ts-jest type-checker invokes tsc which hangs on /mnt/d/ (Windows NTFS) with multiple workers. isolatedModules bypasses the type-check pass; type safety preserved via npm run lint.
key_decisions.outcome: All 151 tests now complete in ~25s instead of hanging indefinitely

key_decisions.decision: Add --runInBand to the npm test script in package.json
key_decisions.rationale: Jest worker pool also hangs on WSL2 NTFS. Running serially in a single process is reliable.
key_decisions.outcome: npm test works correctly for all contributors on this machine

key_decisions.decision: Default EBAPipeline approvalMode to strict rather than dev
key_decisions.rationale: Auto-approving all high-risk actions by default is unsafe. run.ts now opts into dev explicitly.
key_decisions.outcome: Accidental production deployment with dev mode is prevented

key_decisions.decision: Return NodeJS.Timeout from startBenchmarkScheduler and wire process signal handlers in run.ts
key_decisions.rationale: setInterval with a discarded handle cannot be stopped, causing open handles on shutdown.
key_decisions.outcome: Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM; clearInterval called on exit

rejected_ideas.idea: Chase the detectOpenHandles warning to find the source of the open handle
rejected_ideas.reason: AIIndex was ruled out. Remaining source unknown. --forceExit handles it adequately.

rejected_ideas.idea: Put isolatedModules in jest.config.js transform options
rejected_ideas.reason: ts-jest deprecation warning: isolatedModules belongs in tsconfig.json. Moved there.

security_fixes_applied: TEST_COMMAND: shell metacharacter denylist in src/run.ts
SOLUTIONS_DIR: path.resolve + root boundary check in src/run-arena.ts
PromptEnhancer: markdown header/bold stripping before NK injection in src/pipeline/prompt-enhancer.ts
EBAPipeline: approvalMode defaults to strict; dev is explicit opt-in
ModelRouter: destroy() method added; static instances Set now cleanable
Scheduler: NodeJS.Timeout handle returned; SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers wired

metadata.environment: WSL2 on Windows NTFS /mnt/d/projects/eba, Node v22.22.1, Jest 29.7.0, ts-jest 29.1.2, TypeScript 5.3.3
